paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65, with a change of 8.66% from the prior close and a change of -25.86% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 21, 2026.

Recent news headlines include announcements of Fermi's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, as well as reports on the departure of CEO Toby Neugebauer and director Miles Everson. The earnings call is scheduled for August 13, 2026. There have been no new news headlines in the last 24 hours.

There have been 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a Schedule 13G filing. Additionally, there was a social post mentioning the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.
